kit: EvilQuest clean open tent zig-zag wall kit
coordinateNote: Blender X/Y ground plane maps to EvilQuest world X/Z; Blender Z is height. Footprints use 1 Blender unit per game tile.
sceneNote: The visible Blender scene is a single connected 6x4 wall perimeter. Optional connector post and rope-anchor modules remain exportable in the hidden Export_Modules_Hidden collection and are not scattered through the demo.
styleNote: Wall-focused pass only. Canvas wall modules use actual zig-zag folded mesh geometry; roofs/canopies are intentionally omitted.
